original_desc: The debug command in Sendmail is enabled, allowing attackers to execute commands as root.

ai_analysis.summary: Sendmail debug command enables attackers to execute commands as root.

original_desc: CWD ~root command in ftpd allows root access.

ai_analysis.summary: The CWD ~root command in ftpd allows unauthorized root access

original_desc: Buffer overflow in passwd in BSD based operating systems 4.3 and earlier allows local users to gain root privileges by specifying a long shell or GECOS field.

ai_analysis.summary: Buffer overflow in BSD-based passwd allows local users to gain root privileges.

original_desc: Vulnerability in restore in SunOS 4.0.3 and earlier allows local users to gain privileges.

ai_analysis.summary: A vulnerability in SunOS 4.0.3 and earlier allows local users to gain privileges.

original_desc: Vulnerability in rcp on SunOS 4.0.x allows remote attackers from trusted hosts to execute arbitrary commands as root, possibly related to the configuration of the nobody user.

ai_analysis.summary: Vulnerability in rcp on SunOS 4.0.x allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands as root.
